boundaries: Research-only static analysis. Not investment advice. This tool does not fetch live data, connect to brokers, place orders, recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, predict returns, or produce personalized financial advice.

items.acceptance: landing-page, api-reference, and command-matrix agree on command count and output paths.
items.item: Keep the landing page aligned with README and command-matrix as commands evolve.

items.acceptance: workflow_protocol.json remains backwards-readable by agents using protocol_id macro-policy-thesis-map.v1.3.
items.item: Stabilize protocol JSON field names before adding optional adapters.

items.acceptance: api-reference and data-dictionary-diff list the new optional fields without changing base_event_csv.
items.item: Add optional contract examples only when they remain synthetic, static, and additive.

items.acceptance: regression-summary records gate names and no required gate depends on network access.
items.item: Continue treating public-readiness, public-scan, selfcheck, diff-check, pytest, and wheel build as release gates.

not_planned: Live macro or market data fetching.
Private storage or private document references.
release_principles: Prefer deterministic local artifacts over hosted or live references.
Keep the base CSV contract stable and make optional layers additive.
Keep finance boundaries explicit in every public surface.
title: Roadmap Next
